what: SOS/Positivstellensatz WALK-rung measure-before-build reachability probe (ADR 0037 §4 gate)
composite_verdict: AMBER — build as low-regret infra, NOT for proven discovery yield; novelty is the binding constraint
greens: Tooling + EXACT soundness of an SOS/Positivstellensatz certificate (ADR 0037 WALK rung)
box-OUT vs Z3 + Q.E.D.-eligibility for the WALK rung (SOS / Positivstellensatz)

key_findings.soundness: GREEN — exact rational SOS re-check feasible STDLIB-ONLY (identity dict-eq over Q + exact rational LDL^T PSD); float SDP stays off-TCB; proven with code (6/6 cases incl. correct rejections); sostactic precedent ships the ADR 0037 §2 contract in Lean
key_findings.box_out: GREEN — reaches forall x in R^n polynomial nonnegativity (over R, unbounded, forall-proof) — 3 axes of escape from the bounded-integer [0,64] box; orthogonal to Walnut

two_seams_QED.faithfulness_backend_ADR0037_placement: NON-Q.E.D. (faithfulness edge) — but re-check is KERNEL-GRADE (ring re-derives the identity), the first faithfulness backend stronger than Walnut's structural check
two_seams_QED.prover_seam_higher_value: GENUINELY Q.E.D. — if the conjecture IS a polynomial inequality, the SOS cert re-checked by ring+positivity IS a kernel proof (proof edge, like nlinarith/polyrith). A sound path to kernel-verified discovery WITHOUT the run-rung renderer. Different seam (prover_ensemble), must stay uncrossed from LeanVerifier.discharge

key_findings.novelty: AMBER/bimodal — RED competition/olympiad genre (now auto-solved by AIPS/LIPS = textbook ceiling recurrence, the SOS analogue of run-3); GREEN research frontier (flag-algebra extremal combinatorics resolved OPEN conjectures, copositivity/SOS-Lyapunov, SOS lower bounds) but the current conjecturer/DSL cannot render the GREEN class
key_findings.faithfulness_strength: the rung's strongest dimension — the polynomial inequality often IS its own formal statement (3-body gap much smaller than Walnut prose); residual slack (constraint set, strict-vs-non-strict) is lint-able at routing

the_true_go_nogo: a WALK-rung NOVELTY micro-probe: does the conjecturer produce polynomial-nonnegativity claims that are IN-SOS-reach AND box-OUT AND plausibly-non-textbook? soundness-GREEN does NOT clear the build (ADR 0037 §4/§10.5).
recommended_recheck: Option A (stdlib Fraction identity + exact rational LDL^T PSD, ~40 lines, zero float tolerance); cross-check with Lean ring+positivity (Option B) in the soundness review
